title: alloispermum scabrum
intro: Alloispermum scabrum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a shrubby daisy. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Alloispermum scabrum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal and health benefits.
